papers.title: DeepSeek-Prover-V2
papers.contribution: 671B model with recursive subgoal decomposition; 88.9% miniF2F, 49 PutnamBench solves.

papers.title: Goedel-Prover-V2
papers.contribution: Open-source 8B/32B matching 671B models; 90.4% miniF2F with self-correction; scaffolded data synthesis.

papers.title: Kimina-Prover Preview
papers.contribution: Pioneered 'formal reasoning pattern' with large-scale RL; corrected 8 unsolvable miniF2F problems.

papers.title: Seed-Prover 1.5
papers.contribution: Agentic RL prover; 88% PutnamBench, 5/6 IMO 2025; balances step-level and whole-proof modes.

papers.title: HILBERT
papers.contribution: Recursive informal-to-formal pipeline with semantic Mathlib retrieval.

papers.title: AlphaProof
papers.contribution: AlphaZero-inspired RL; silver medal IMO 2024 (28/42); auto-formalized 80M problems; introduces TTRL.

papers.title: HorizonMath
papers.contribution: First contamination-proof benchmark of unsolved problems with automated verification. ~0% SOTA.

papers.title: Mathematical exploration and discovery at scale
papers.authors: Bogdan Georgiev et al. + Terence Tao
papers.contribution: AlphaEvolve improved bounds on open problems including Nikodym sets and Kakeya bounds in dim 3-5.

papers.title: Aletheia: Semi-Autonomous Mathematics Discovery
papers.contribution: Gemini-based agent addressed 13/700 open Erdos problems; discusses 'subconscious plagiarism' risk. ~100 Erdos problems transferred to 'solved' since Oct 2025.

papers.title: miniF2F-Lean Revisited
papers.contribution: >50% of miniF2F formal/informal statement pairs have discrepancies; autoformalization accuracy 'largely inflated'.

papers.title: FormalMATH
papers.contribution: 5,560 Lean 4 problems; inverse relationship between NL guidance and formal proof success.

papers.title: Discovering mathematical concepts through multi-agent system
papers.contribution: Multi-agent system autonomously recovers concept of homology from polyhedral data.

papers.title: Shaping the Future of Mathematics in the Age of AI
papers.contribution: Survey/position paper on AI's transformative role in mathematics.
